'''holaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vealy|vealy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vealy|vealy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| holaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || holarithi || holariji || holarishi || holariki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || holaruthu || holaruju || holarushu || holaruku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || holaruthu || holaruju || holarushu || holaruku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || holarufthuf || holarufjuf || holarufshuf || holarufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || holarethe || holareje || holareshe || holareke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || holarotho || holarojo || holarosho || holaroko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || holarotho || holarojo || holarosho || holaroko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || holarofthof || holarofjof || holarofshof || holarofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || holarïfthïf || holarïfjïf || holarïfshïf || holarïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || holarïfthïf || holarïfjïf || holarïfshïf || holarïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || holarïfthïf || holarïfjïf || holarïfshïf || holarïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || holarïfthïf || holarïfjïf || holarïfshïf || holarïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || holaræthæ || holaræjæ || holaræshæ || holarækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || holaratha || holaraja || holarasha || holaraka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || holaratha || holaraja || holarasha || holaraka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || holarafthaf || holarafjaf || holarafshaf || holarafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || holarasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || holarshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || holarroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || holarmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || holaryaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goholarnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goholarnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goholarnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goholarnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || holalarasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || holalarshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || holalarroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || holalarmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || holalaryaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goholalarnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goholalarnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goholalarnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goholalarnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || helærasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || helærshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || helærroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || helærmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || helæryaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gohelærnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gohelærnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gohelærnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gohelærnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || holfarasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || holfarshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || holfarroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || holfarmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || holfaryaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goholfarnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goholfarnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goholfarnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goholfarnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
